channel.title: ammonia-borane; bimetallic ruthenium catalysts; heterogeneous catalysis;catalytic hydrolysis; hydrogen storage on LMI

item.title: Bimetallic Ruco And Rucu Catalysts Supported On Gamma-Al2O3. Acomparative Study Of Their Activity In Hydrolysis Of Ammonia-Borane
